page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6v-c10g1.20xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 82 dedicated physical cores utilizing Intel Xeon 8163 processors running at a clock speed of 2.5 GHz. The CPU configuration allocates exactly one thread per core, ensuring dedicated compute resources without hyperthreading overhead.

The instance is equipped with 336.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 4.1 GB of RAM per core. Acceleration is delivered via eight NVIDIA V100 GPUs, providing a combined total of 128 GB of VRAM. This instance does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 35 Gbps.

Given the inclusion of eight dedicated enterprise-grade GPUs and a high count of physical CPU cores, this server represents a high-density hardware profile designed for parallel processing workloads. The lack of local storage requires external storage provisioning, which should be factored into architectural planning. This configuration is suited for GPU-intensive workloads such as deep learning training, complex scientific simulations, high-performance computing, and large-scale parallel data processing.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6v-c10g1.20xlarge is a high-density, GPU-accelerated server built on the KVM hypervisor. It features 82 dedicated physical cores powered by Intel Xeon 8163 processors running at 2.5 GHz with a single thread per core. The hardware configuration includes 336.0 GB of system memory and eight NVIDIA V100 GPUs with a total of 128 GB of VRAM. It does not include local storage, relying instead on network-attached storage options, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 35 Gbps. This instance is designed for parallel computing tasks, making it suitable for deep learning, scientific simulations, and high-performance computing workloads.

tagline: A high-density parallel computing platform featuring eight dedicated GPUs and eighty-two physical processor cores for demanding acceleration workloads.
